gaps.gap: Phone-based lead-qualification and business-development role experience
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has commercial operations and stakeholder-engagement experience but no stated background in phone-intensive prospecting, lead qualification, or account development. This is a core duty of the role.

gaps.gap: Inbound and outbound sales-activity management and lead-nurturing cadence

Candidate's domain is Google commercial operations; no stated exposure to partner-ecosystem engagement, partner qualification, or go-to-market through channels.

gaps.gap: Role scope is significantly below candidate seniority ceiling
gaps.mitigation: This is an individual-contributor, quota-influenced business-development representative role. Candidate's eight-year track record and two promotions position them well above entry-level scope.

output.level_rationale: Role is an individual-contributor, phone-based Partner Development Representative with no stated management scope, no years-experience requirement, and responsibility limited to lead qualification and handoff. Title and duties map to L3 graduate or early-career commercial role. Company size/stage not stated in JD (lowers confidence modestly).
output.summary: This role is a phone-based Partner Development Representative focused on inbound/outbound lead qualification and handoff to a partner sales team—core duties of a junior business-development function, not a Strategy and Operations, Revenue Operations, or Business Transformation role. Although the candidate has strong Salesforce administration, systems thinking, and stakeholder-communication skills, the absence of phone-based prospecting, lead-nurturing, or partner-channel experience, combined with a significant seniority mismatch (eight-year senior-IC tenure to entry-level BDR scope), places this outside target or approved-stretch families. Recommend skip: candidate's background and seniority trajectory do not align with the role's scope or family."
